name: normalization: the AWS boundary marks a native finding it cannot map to a grounded concern as needs_grounding (cite-or-decline), not a silent pass
command: printf '{"schema_version":"1.0","platform":"aws","route":"aws-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest"]},"iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest"],"recommendations":[],"native_review_ref":null}' > h.json && printf '{"review_ref":"r","recommendations":[{"id":"ZZZ-9","title":"unmappable finding","pillar":"nonsense-pillar","severity":"LOW"}]}' > n.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"/commands/aws-boundary.sh --handoff h.json --native-response n.json --out o.json && node -e 'const b=require("./o.json");process.exit(b.normalized.recommendations[0].grounding==="needs_grounding"?0:1)' && echo finding-needs-grounding 1>&2
